memory.summary: The room's stale odor and clutter are draining my focus, but since my roommate is out until 7, I can relocate to the quiet library to work without conflict.
Moving to the library restored my focus but left the underlying sleep disruption unaddressed, meaning tonight's rest will still suffer.
I made steady progress on the reading response, yet my accumulated sleep debt and the library's temporary relief still leave my underlying energy and stress unaddressed.
I made steady progress on the reading response, but my accumulated sleep debt and high stress remain unaddressed despite the temporary focus boost.
I made progress on the reading response, but my roommate's return now presents a choice: address the underlying issue directly or postpone it.
The roommate was unaware of the odor and responded gratefully to my direct request, resolving the issue without conflict.
I've made solid progress on the reading response, yet my high stress and sleep debt remain unaddressed despite the task momentum.
I advanced the reading response to 86% after two hours, but my energy is now depleted with significant sleep debt and lingering stress.
